nasb.text: In those days, when there was again a large crowd and they had nothing to eat, Jesus called His disciples and *said to them,

esv.text: In those days, when again a great crowd had gathered, and they had nothing to eat, he called his disciples to him and said to them,

cnv.text: 那些日子，又有一大群人聚集，他們沒有甚麼東西吃。耶穌叫門徒來，對他們說：

ccb.text: 那时，又有一大群人聚在一起，他们没有东西吃。耶稣就叫来门徒，说：

csbs.text: 在那些日子里，又一次，有一大群人，他们没有什么东西吃。耶稣召来门徒们，对他们说：
